name: PFMetricCard
description: Instrument surface for one measurable value, status, or trend.
responsibility: Display one measurable value, status, or trend.

requirements: Metric values must include readable labels and units when relevant.
Status or trend meaning must not rely on color alone.
Live-updating metrics should announce important changes appropriately.

composition_rules: Each metric card should communicate one metric or one tightly coupled metric state.
Optional descriptions should explain the metric rather than duplicate the value.
Variant emphasis should match the metric meaning and system semantics.
